SEARCH
Package egovframework.com.cmm

Class EgovComCrossSiteHndlr

java.lang.Object
jakarta.servlet.jsp.tagext.TagSupport
jakarta.servlet.jsp.tagext.BodyTagSupport
egovframework.com.cmm.EgovComCrossSiteHndlr
All Implemented Interfaces:
jakarta.servlet.jsp.tagext.BodyTag, jakarta.servlet.jsp.tagext.IterationTag, jakarta.servlet.jsp.tagext.JspTag, jakarta.servlet.jsp.tagext.Tag, Serializable
public class EgovComCrossSiteHndlr extends jakarta.servlet.jsp.tagext.BodyTagSupport
Cross-Site Scripting 체크하여 값을 되돌려 받는 핸들러 JSP TLD, 자바에서 사용가능
Since:
2010.11.09
Version:
1.0
Author:
공통서비스 장동한
See Also:
  •  << 개정이력(Modification Information) >>

      public EgovComCrossSiteHndlr()
      Constructs a new handler. As with TagSupport, subclasses should not provide other constructors and are expected to call the superclass constructor.

    • out

      public static void out(jakarta.servlet.jsp.PageContext pageContext, boolean escapeXml, Object obj) throws IOException
      Outputs text to pageContext's current JspWriter. If escapeXml is true, performs the following substring replacements (to facilitate output to XML/HTML pages): invalid input: '&' -> & invalid input: '<' -> < > -> > " -> " ' -> ' See also Util.escapeXml().
      Throws:
      IOException

    • out2

      public static void out2(jakarta.servlet.jsp.PageContext pageContext, boolean escapeXml, Object obj) throws IOException
      Throws:
      IOException
